1. The user must be able to register with email and password.
2. The password must have a minimum of 8 characters and a maximum of 128 characters.
3. The email must be unique in the system.
4. After successful registration, the user receives a confirmation email within 5 minutes.
5. The system must lock the account after 5 consecutive failed login attempts.
6. Locked accounts can only be unlocked by an administrator.
